title: WT_v8_complete
theory_name: Weaving Theory (WT) v8.0 — 編織論完整版

primitives.description: class of weaving elements (all structural objects)
primitives.evidence: ℒ          編織元類（class of weaving elements）

primitives.description: weaving relation between two weaving elements
primitives.evidence: ℓ₁ ⋈ ℓ₂    編織關係（weaving relation）

primitives.description: n-ary weaving operation combining elements into a new weaving element
primitives.evidence: W: ℒⁿ → ℒ  編織操作（weaving operation, n-ary）

primitives.description: intrinsic measure (mass/energy dimension) of a weaving element
primitives.evidence: μ₀(ℓ) ∈ ℝ⁺               內稟測度（intrinsic measure）——「質量／能量」

primitives.description: distortion degree — deviation from an ideal state
primitives.evidence: ξ(ℓ) ∈ ℝ⁺            歪曲度（distortion）——偏離理想態的程度

primitives.description: efficiency / computational cost of a weaving element
primitives.evidence: ε(ℓ) ∈ ℝ⁺      效率／計算成本（efficiency / computational cost）

primitives.description: veridicality (authenticity) measure on the complex weaving element class
chirality (handedness) scalar, the ninth dimension of a weaving element
primitives.evidence: h(ℓ) ∈ [-1, +1]           手性旋向度（chirality，第九維；W94 升格）

axioms.name: 編織操作閉包 (Weaving closure)
axioms.formula: ∀ℓ₁, …, ℓₙ ∈ ℒ, ∃ w = W(ℓ₁, …, ℓₙ) ∈ ℒ
axioms.description: Any combination of n weaving elements is itself a weaving element.
axioms.evidence: ∀ℓ₁, …, ℓₙ ∈ ℒ, ∃ w = W(ℓ₁, …, ℓₙ) ∈ ℒ

axioms.name: 歪曲度飽和定理 (Distortion saturation)
axioms.description: Distortion evolves toward a maximal saturation value rather than toward zero; perfection (ξ=0) equals nothingness, maximal distortion is the necessary condition for existence.

axioms.name: 臨界糾纏度 (Critical entanglement / PIAC)
axioms.formula: ∃ ξ_c > 0: ξ_entangle(ℓ₁, ℓ₂) ≥ ξ_c ⇒ 不可分離（PIAC）
axioms.description: Above a critical entanglement threshold, two elements become permanently, irreversibly, asymptotically coupled (PIAC).
axioms.evidence: ∃ ξ_c > 0: ξ_entangle(ℓ₁, ℓ₂) ≥ ξ_c ⇒ 不可分離（PIAC）

axioms.name: 知識-運算對偶律 (K-C Duality)
axioms.description: Pre-computed knowledge and online computation are dual: their product has a Landauer-type incompressible lower bound.

axioms.name: 同構-效率分離 (Isomorphism-efficiency separation)
axioms.description: Structural isomorphism does not imply equal computational efficiency, challenging category theory's 'isomorphism = equivalence'.

axioms.name: 投影不可合一性 (Projection incommensurability)
axioms.formula: ∀P₁, P₂ ∈ ℙ, P₁ ≠ P₂ ⇒ ∃A: WT_{P₁} ⊢ A ∧ WT_{P₂} ⊢ ¬A
axioms.description: Different paradigm-projections of the ultimate truth T* necessarily contain mutually contradictory propositions; each projection is internally consistent.
axioms.evidence: ∀P₁, P₂ ∈ ℙ, P₁ ≠ P₂ ⇒ ∃A: WT_{P₁} ⊢ A ∧ WT_{P₂} ⊢ ¬A

axioms.name: 複數編織元擴展 (Complex weaving extension)
axioms.formula: ℒ_ℂ := {ℓ_real + i · ℓ_imag | ℓ_real, ℓ_imag ∈ ℒ}
axioms.description: Weaving elements are extended into a complex plane: a real part (genuine structural weaving) and an imaginary part (surface adherence/packaging).
axioms.evidence: ℒ_ℂ := {ℓ_real + i · ℓ_imag | ℓ_real, ℓ_imag ∈ ℒ}

axioms.name: 真實性測度 (Veridicality measure)
axioms.description: Authenticity is defined as the proportion of total intensity carried by the real (genuinely woven) part.

axioms.name: 偽附著的寄生性 (Parasitism of pseudo-adherence)
axioms.description: A pseudo-adherent (imaginary) component cannot exist independently; it must parasitize a genuine host, and collapses automatically if the host is removed.

axioms.name: 包裝強度與虛部比例 (Rationalization intensity)
axioms.description: The thickness of rationalizing packaging is proportional to the imaginary-part share; packaging itself is observable evidence of pseudo-adherence ('packaging is a positive sign').

theorems.name: 九元組完備性 (Nine-tuple completeness)
theorems.statement: ℓ₁ ≠ ℓ₂ ⟺ ∃i ∈ {1, …, 9}: 第 i 分量不同
theorems.description: Two weaving elements differ iff they differ in at least one of the nine coordinates (μ₀, M, n, N, ξ, ξ_entangle, ε, V, h).
theorems.evidence: ℓ₁ ≠ ℓ₂ ⟺ ∃i ∈ {1, …, 9}: 第 i 分量不同

theorems.name: 平衡 = 極限戰爭僵局 (Equilibrium as limit-tension standoff)
theorems.statement: 平衡 ≠ 靜止; 平衡 = ⟨ℰ^∞ − 𝒱^∞⟩ = 0 且 ℰ, 𝒱 → ∞, f = ω_P
theorems.description: Equilibrium is redefined as the statistical cancellation of two infinite opposing tensions oscillating at Planck frequency, not stillness.
theorems.evidence:
平衡 ≠ 靜止
平衡 = ⟨ℰ^∞ − 𝒱^∞⟩ = 0 且 ℰ, 𝒱 → ∞, f = ω_P

theorems.name: 同構-效率分離 (Isomorphism-efficiency separation, constructive)
theorems.statement: ∃ ℓ₁, ℓ₂: ℓ₁ ≅_結構 ℓ₂ ∧ lim_{N→∞} ε(ℓ₁,N)/ε(ℓ₂,N) = ∞
theorems.description: Constructive example (direct DFT vs FFT) showing structurally isomorphic objects can have unboundedly diverging efficiency.
theorems.evidence: ∃ ℓ₁, ℓ₂: ℓ₁ ≅_結構 ℓ₂ ∧ lim_{N→∞} ε(ℓ₁,N)/ε(ℓ₂,N) = ∞

theorems.name: R 強度作為真實性反指標 (R as inverse indicator)
theorems.description: Higher rationalization intensity implies lower veridicality; 'packaging is a positive sign' of pseudo-adherence.

theorems.name: 偽附著互斥律 (Pseudo-adherence mutual-exclusion law)
theorems.statement: ∀ψℓ_A, ψℓ_B ∈ ψℒ: ξ_entangle(ψℓ_A, ψℓ_B) < ξ_c 恆成立
theorems.description: Two low-V pseudo-adherent objects sharing a host cannot reach PIAC-level fusion; they can only ever form an apparent, unstable coalition.
theorems.evidence: 機制一（結構性）：∀ψℓ_A, ψℓ_B ∈ ψℒ: ξ_entangle(ψℓ_A, ψℓ_B) < ξ_c 恆成立

theorems.name: 真融偽裂定理 (True-fusion/false-fission theorem)
theorems.statement: 高 V（真 ⋈）：可達 ξ_c ⇒ PIAC ⇒ 融合成更大共同體；低 V（僅 ⋈_apparent）：恆 < ξ_c ⇒ 永不真融 ⇒ 永久裂解
theorems.description: High-veridicality objects can fuse into larger genuine communities; low-veridicality objects can never truly fuse and permanently fragment into isolated islands.
theorems.evidence:
高 V（真 ⋈）：可達 ξ_c ⇒ PIAC ⇒ 融合成更大共同體
低 V（僅 ⋈_apparent）：恆 < ξ_c ⇒ 永不真融 ⇒ 永久裂解

theorems.name: 源頭合一定理 (Source-point unity theorem)
theorems.statement: 源頭 o：μ_⋈(o) = 0 ⟹ μ_sep → 0 ≤ δ_μ ⟹ R(μ_sep) → 0 ⟹ D(ℓ_A, ℓ_B) = Δ · R → 0
theorems.description: At the weaving source, distinguishability between all constituents vanishes regardless of characteristic difference — indistinguishability, not literal oneness.
theorems.evidence:
源頭 o：μ_⋈(o) = 0（W22）
  ⟹ μ_sep → 0 ≤ δ_μ ⟹ R(μ_sep) → 0
  ⟹ D(ℓ_A, ℓ_B) = Δ · R → 0   ∀ℓ_A, ℓ_B（不論 Δ 多大）

theorems.name: V→K 橋接命題 (Veridicality-to-knowledge bridge)
theorems.description: Pseudo-adherent objects have no genuine weaving to draw structured pre-computed knowledge from, so K collapses to zero (one-directional implication).

concepts.name: 編織論 / Weaving Theory / WT
concepts.evidence: # 編織論（Weaving Theory, WT）完整版 v8.0

concepts.name: 九元組
concepts.evidence: WT v8.0 主張任何編織元被九個維度完整刻畫：

concepts.name: 編織元
concepts.evidence: ℒ          編織元類（class of weaving elements）

concepts.name: 底空間（範式軸）
concepts.evidence: A₁ ∈ {C, D}        底空間：連續／離散

concepts.name: 真實性測度 V / 複本體論
知識-運算對偶律 K-C Duality
PIAC（相變誘導絕對耦合）
concepts.evidence: PIAC（Phase-transition-Induced Absolute Coupling）：ξ_entangle ≥ ξ_c 時的不可分離真融合態（W37）。

concepts.name: 元公理性
concepts.evidence: 公理 W55–W63 本身可被質疑和演化

concepts.name: 投影不可合一性 / 多範式投影
concepts.evidence: ∀P₁, P₂ ∈ ℙ, P₁ ≠ P₂ ⇒ ∃A: WT_{P₁} ⊢ A ∧ WT_{P₂} ⊢ ¬A

concepts.name: 極限平衡性 / 平衡即極限戰爭僵局
concepts.evidence: 平衡 = 兩個無限大力的對抗僵局

concepts.name: Landauer 極限 / 不可壓縮性
concepts.evidence: 直觀：Landauer 極限——ε₀ ~ k_B T ln 2，任何實在計算都有最低能量代價。

concepts.name: 可區分性測度 D / 源頭合一
concepts.evidence: D(ℓ_A, ℓ_B) := Δ · R(μ_sep)     可區分性測度（distinguishability measure）

concepts.name: 包裝即陽性
concepts.evidence: 包裝即陽性原則：包裝的存在本身就是偽附著的可觀察證據——真編織元不需要厚重包裝就能站立。

concepts.name: 分層假說紀律 H1/H2/H3
concepts.evidence: **H1（強假說）**：可被歷史資料、生態統計、跨域案例庫證偽。

notes: Self-contained 104-axiom ontology (WT v8.0); no explicit citations to other corpus lm-ids were found in source text, so external_refs is empty. Selected load-bearing axioms/theorems across representative groups (existence, distortion, entanglement, K-C duality, efficiency, projectivity, authenticity/AUTH, distinguishability/DIST) given the 104-axiom cap.
